# Messaging Brief: AuditReady

AuditReady gives regulated quality teams a faster way to prepare controlled documents for audits.

## Who this is for

Product: Controlled-document workflow platform
Market: Mid-market life sciences quality teams
Locale: US
Geography: United States, Canada
Industry: Biotech, Medical devices
Company size: 200-1000, 1000+
Companies: Northstar Biologics, Apex Medical Systems
Target account lists: Tier 1 regulated accounts
Job title: VP Quality, Director of Quality Assurance
Job function: Quality, Operations
Seniority: Director, VP
Skills: Quality management systems, GxP compliance

## Message inputs

Keywords: eQMS software, audit readiness
Pain: manual document control
Gains: faster audit preparation
Objections: migration effort
Trigger: upcoming regulatory inspection

## Campaign controls

Exclusions: Current customers
Negative keywords: jobs, training
Suppression lists: active opportunities
Goal: qualified demo requests
Budget: $20,000
Primary conversion event: Qualified demo request
Measurement threshold: 30 qualified demo requests
Audience size requirements: 10,000 reachable members
Channels: linkedin-ads, google-ads-youtube, microsoft-ads
